task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "在微信App中找到文章的分享链接"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "将链接粘贴到桌面浏览器中打开"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "通过浏览器工具手动保存文章为PDF或HTML"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "运行Python脚本以发起HTTP请求获取文章内容"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "解析HTML文档以提取文章主体内容"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "从解析的内容中提取文本并保存到本地文件"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "从解析的内容中提取所有图片URL"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "下载图片并保存到本地文件夹"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "创建用于保存内容的本地文件夹（如果不存在）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "使用归档服务（如Archive.today或Wayback Machine）保存文章"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "提取文章标题和作者信息"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "标记段落和子标题并格式化输出"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "验证提取的文章内容是否完整"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "验证图片是否全部成功下载"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "将文章内容导出为PDF格式"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "pasteLink"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "saveManually"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node4", "type": "fetchContent"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "parseHTML"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "extractText"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "findImages"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "downloadImages"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node6", "type": "saveToFolder"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node8", "type": "saveToFolder"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node10", "type": "archiveArticle"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node11", "type": "extractTitleAuthor"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node12", "type": "formatSubheadings"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node13", "type": "validateContent"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node14", "type": "validateImages"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node15", "type": "exportToPDF"}]}
